series.label: SERIES
series.enter_a_description_for_this: Enter a description for this series...
series.merge_body: All of this series's books will be re-pointed at the target. This series will be deleted; the target's description, cover, and other details win.

contributor.from_your_library_this_action: from your library. This action cannot be undone.
contributor.no_aliases_hint: No alternate names yet. Merge another author to add one.
contributor.remove_from_library: This will remove this contributor from your library. Books will not be deleted.
contributor.merge_body: The contributor you choose is merged into this one: their books are re-linked here (their original credit is preserved) and their name is added as an alias. The chosen contributor is then removed; this contributor's biography, image, and other details are kept.
contributor.unmerge_body: This will split "%1$s" back into its own contributor. Any books credited as "%1$s" will be re-linked to the new contributor.

shelf.about_shelves_body: Shelves are your own collections — group books however you like. Make a shelf private to keep it just for you, or leave it public to share with everyone on the server.

admin.registration_open_desc: Anyone can register and join instantly.

admin.registration_closed_desc: Self-registration is off — people join by invite only.
admin.restore_confirm_message: This replaces everything on this server, including all user accounts, with the contents of this backup. You'll be signed out and must sign in again with an account from this backup. This cannot be undone.
admin.restore_destructive_body: Restoring replaces all current server data with the contents of this backup. This cannot be undone.
admin.restore_from_file_description: Upload a .listenup.zip backup file from your device.
admin.restore_from_file_detail: You can restore a backup created on any ListenUp server, including one from a different machine. The file will be uploaded and staged, then you'll confirm the restore.
admin.restore_images_included: Cover images and avatars were included.
admin.restore_images_not_included: Cover images and avatars were not included.
admin.scan_all_paths_for_new: Scan all paths for new or updated audiobooks
admin.share_your_audiobook_library_with: Share your audiobook library with others
admin.tap_to_create_your_first: Tap + to create your first genre
admin.the_book_will_not_be: The book will not be deleted from your library.
admin.the_display_name_for_this: The display name for this collection
admin.these_books_will_become_visible: These books will become visible to ALL users.
admin.they_will_no_longer_have: They will no longer have access to the books in this collection.
admin.they_wont_be_able_to: They won't be able to use this link anymore.
admin.this_users_permissions_cannot_be: This user's permissions cannot be modified
